Neon Ninja Run
Chapters Modes Support App Store

Privacy Policy

Privacy Policy

Last updated: May 8, 2026

Overview

Neon Ninja Run is a game with optional ads, optional in-app purchases, analytics, crash reporting, and Game Center features. We do not sell personal information.

Data We Use

The app may collect gameplay events, purchase status, ad events, crash diagnostics, device information needed for app reliability, and Game Center achievement or leaderboard progress if you use Game Center.

Analytics and Crash Reports

We use Firebase Analytics and Firebase Crashlytics to understand important app actions and diagnose crashes. Crash reports may include technical device and app state information.

Ads

The app may show ads through Google AdMob. Ad providers may use device or advertising data according to their own policies and your device privacy settings.

In-App Purchases

Purchases are processed by Apple. We receive purchase status needed to unlock items, remove ads, grant currency, or enable premium rewards.

Contact

Questions can be sent to support@neonninjarun.com.

Neon Ninja Run

Fast action arcade running in neon worlds.

Support Privacy Terms App Store
